{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "de5c8282480b672b",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 06 - Visualize Phases, VisualizationConfig, visualization_config_wrapper"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c65379ad9db77489",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "initial_id",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": true,
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:59.067332300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:58.555617400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "9d2361caa390279f",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "97371acf7dfe5de6",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:59.081354100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:59.074574400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "216df72c392ef11f",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:03.608993100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:59.082882900Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "3f352d22d6df3c22",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:04.574138500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:03.617617500Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "segmented_data = eet.add_primitive_segments(df=standardized_data, config=eet.PrimitiveConfig.OCV_ANALYSIS_DEFAULT)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "687758bd76080dfe",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: Visualize Phases"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "f81103e71e1bb10e",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:06.097233500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:04.574138500Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.visualize_phases(df=segmented_data, config=eet.VisualizationConfig.DEFAULT)"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 3840x648 with 3 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ac24964f378f0ed6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 2: Visualize Phases with a custom configuration"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1f48a9773a358a26",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "A VisualizationConfig has the following parameters:"
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-info\">\n",
    "<b>Hint:</b> You can type in \"eet.VisualizationConfig.\" to see all other availiable VisualizationConfig in most IDEs\n",
    "</div>"
   ],
   "id": "269671a1a6996883"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "b89e70163011b2a4",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:06.123152100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:06.109288600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.VisualizationConfig.DEFAULT"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "_VisualizationConfigClass(visualize_phases_config=[('V', 'blue'), ('I', 'red'), ('P', 'green')], line_visualization_config=[('Voltage[V]', 'blue', (2.4, 4.3)), ('Current[A]', 'red', (-10, 10)), ('Power[W]', 'green', (-40, 20))], start=0, end=1e+100, use_lines_for_segments=True, show_column_names=True, show_time=True, show_id=True, show_runtime=True, segment_alpha=0.3, width_height_ratio=[1, 0.3], end_condition_map_generate_instructions={'CC': 'voltage', 'CV': 'current', 'CP': 'voltage', 'Pause': 'time'}, standard_columns=['Test_Time[s]', 'Voltage[V]', 'Current[A]'])"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 6
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-info\">\n",
    "<b>Hint:</b> Use visualization_config_wrapper to create your own custom VisualizationConfig that overwrites the standard values\n",
    "</div>"
   ],
   "id": "b10404b98f7efce8"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "8e0991c092ee1ba0",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:06.431591800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:06.124177700Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "eet.visualize_phases(\n",
    "    df=segmented_data,\n",
    "    config=eet.visualization_config_wrapper(  # overwritten the default values\n",
    "        start=100000,\n",
    "        end=115000,\n",
    "        width_height_ratio=[1, 0.5],\n",
    "        visualize_phases_config=[\n",
    "            (\"V\", \"blue\"),\n",
    "            (\"I\", \"red\"),\n",
    "        ],\n",
    "        line_visualization_config=[\n",
    "            (\"Voltage[V]\", \"blue\", (2.4, 3.6)),\n",
    "            (\"Current[A]\", \"red\", (-4, 4)),\n",
    "        ],\n",
    "        show_id=False,\n",
    "        show_time=False,\n",
    "        show_column_names=False,\n",
    "    ),\n",
    ")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 3840x1080 with 2 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 7
  }
 ],
